title: View Source
scenario: A simple website with a hidden secret.
objective: Find the flag hidden in the page source.
hints: Look for a "View Page Source" option in your browser.
The flag is hidden in a comment like <!-- FLAG{...} -->
explanation: Websites are made of HTML code that your browser reads. Sometimes developers leave comments in the code that aren't visible on the page itself.
preventionTip: Never leave sensitive information or secrets in client-side code or comments.

title: Hidden Comments
objective: Find the flag hidden in a developer comment.
hints: Look for comments at the bottom of the page.
Developers often use comments to leave notes for themselves.
explanation: Comments are useful for developers but can be a security risk if they contain sensitive info.
preventionTip: Use a build process that strips comments from production code.
